meta.description: Reusable public direct URL map for the exact 18 mock games in lib/mock-data.ts (and bulk import fallback). Replaces all 18+ picsum.photos placeholders with authentic high-quality game art from official CDNs. Intended for consumption by Agent 2 (enrichment), Agent 5 (resolver seeds), Agent 4 (admin/ingest), and verification. All URLs are hotlinkable, stable, and already permitted in next.config.ts remotePatterns.
sources: Steam CDN: https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/steam/apps/{appId}/library_600x900.jpg (preferred vertical 600x900 covers for cards/heroes)
IGDB Image CDN: https://images.igdb.com/igdb/image/upload/t_cover_big/{hash}.jpg (for non-Steam titles: VALORANT, League of Legends, Alan Wake 2, Hades II)
meta.attributionPolicy: All images © their respective rights holders (game studios/publishers). For demo, educational, and non-commercial informational use only. Do not hotlink in production without proper licensing or ingest-to-Storage pipeline. UI should display subtle attribution where feasible (see Game.coverAttribution).
meta.usage: import covers from './public-game-covers.json'; const url = covers.covers['cyberpunk-2077'].url; Also see bulkImportFallback.
